notes: Keep trainer movement, creature combat, alpha telegraphs, captures, and active hitboxes on the top pane.
The top pane should stay readable even when the bottom pane is full of command data.

bottom.role: creature commands, party state, capture prompt, combat log, and pause controls
notes: Use the bottom pane for command buttons, cooldowns, party/active creature state, capture prompts, and combat log.
Do not require touch-only creature commands; keyboard/controller bindings must stay active.

controls.touch: bottom-pane command cards and party controls
notes: One full alpha or standard battle loop must be playable without touchscreen-only actions.

requiredReceipts: stacked-ds layout shows battlefield above command panel
foldable or simulated segment layout keeps battle and commands separated
RGDS Android mode device receipt before marking verified
one full battle reaches victory, loss, capture, or reset state
